arts.ttl: Harry Kane: Tottenham to Bayern move led to improved 'aura'
arts.sum: Harry Kane has said he sees himself with a real chance of winning the next men's Ballon d'Or, adding his "aura" as a player has improved since joining Bayern Munich . "Just being at a club like Bayern Munich has helped push me on even more, confidence-wise and responsibility-wise," Kane told reporters ahead of Friday's World Cup qualifier against Albania .

arts.ttl: Harry Kane believes fans are ‘bored’ by his goals: ‘If I was 25 it would be different’
arts.sum: The England captain says he is ‘excited’ for the games against Albania and Latvia

arts.ttl: Kane excited about new England chapter under Tuchel
arts.sum: England captain Harry Kane says the team are "excited to start a new chapter" under new manager Thomas Tuchel before their 2026 World Cup qualifier against Albania at Wembley.

arts.ttl: Why Tuchel is the 'perfect fit' for England
arts.sum: BBC Sport pundit Thomas Hitzlsperger discusses the tactics of new England manager Thomas Tuchel before Friday's game against Albania.

arts.ttl: What is managing England really like?
arts.sum: Former England managers Sven-Goran Eriksson, Sam Allardyce and Roy Hodgson, speaking in 2018, shared their experiences of the job Thomas Tuchel has taken on.

arts.ttl: England: Harry Kane reacts to Jordan Henderson recall after Thomas Tuchel endorsement
arts.sum: The veteran midfielder is back in the fold under the new head coach

arts.ttl: How to watch England vs Albania FOR FREE: TV channel and live stream for Thomas Tuchel's first game
arts.sum: All eyes on opening 2026 World Cup qualifier at Wembley as a new era begins for the Three Lions

arts.ttl: England need hunger to win not fear to lose - Tuchel
arts.sum: England manager Thomas Tuchel says he wants the team to play with a "hunger to win" and not "a fear to lose" as he prepares for his first match in charge of the Three Lions on Friday.

arts.ttl: Premier League intensity or caution - how will Tuchel's England play?
arts.sum: Before Thomas Tuchel's first game as England boss, BBC Sport tries to unpick - and predict - how his Three Lions side might play.

arts.ttl: Friday's World Cup Qualifying predictions including England vs. Albania
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's World Cup qualifying fixtures, including England vs. Albania.
